title: Gosari Stew with Briny Flair
description: A hearty stew featuring gosari mushrooms, briny flavors, and Ukrainian spices.

ingredients.name: briny liquid (such as soy sauce or fish sauce)
ukrainian spices (such as paprika, dill, and caraway seeds)

instructions: Heat the tranquil oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced gosari mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the briny liquid, Ukrainian spices, and stew. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes.
Stir in the chopped fernbrake and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Serve hot, garnished with additional fernbrake if desired.
